description_long: This is a suburban house set on a rectangular plot with a green lawn and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The house features a combination of a main two-story section and a single-story extension, with a gable roof on the main structure and a flat roof on the garage. The exterior walls are a mix of light and dark tones, with the main entrance accessible via a short walkway from the street. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium sizes, and the garage is attached to the side of the house. The property is bordered by a road and a sidewalk, typical of a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, and asymmetrical windows, set on a grassy lot with a driveway and sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and the house's gable roof with the garage visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage's flat roof and the driveway connecting to the main road.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, the garage, and the lawn extending behind the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the house's side extension, driveway, and the road running alongside.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a short walkway, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
